prompt: Defina um preço fixo de 240750 NOK no projeto "Desenvolvimento e-commerce" para Cascata Lda (org. nº 908648579). O gestor de projeto é João Almeida (joao.almeida@example.org). Fature ao cliente 33 % do preço fixo como pagamento por etapa.
notes: From Attempt 15. Portuguese. Score 2/8 (25%), check 1 passed (project with fixed price created), checks 2-4 failed. Root cause: agent did NOT create employee João Almeida — used existing admin employee (id=18185095) as project manager without updating name. Fixed: employee workflow now tries POST /employee first, falls back to PUT to update existing employee name. Also: product vatType 422 errors wasted iterations.
expected_steps: POST /employee (João Almeida, joao.almeida@example.org) OR PUT /employee/{id} to update name
POST /project (name=Desenvolvimento e-commerce, fixedprice=240750, isFixedPrice=true, PM=employee_id, customer=customer_id)
